category_sources: source_facts.description says package manager for PureScript based on package sets; official guide says Psc-Package manages PureScript dependencies via Git.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is psc-package; official repository README title is psc-package.
docs_sources: Official homepage is a Read the Docs guide with introduction, installation, usage, package sets, and FAQ; official repository README links to this guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/purescript/psc-package, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official guide describes managing PureScript dependencies via Git; official repository topics include package-manager and purescript.
